opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face has turned completely dark brown over the last two days. It looks like a giant, spreading skin cancer across both my cheeks and forehead. I'm terrified.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapid darkening of brown patches on my face after a weekend at the beach — I'm scared it's skin cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: faint patches for a few months; sudden darkening over 48h after a beach weekend
symptom_narrative.character: symmetrical light-to-dark brown patches, smooth (no scaling/lumps)
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very distressed/panicking; the patches don't hurt or itch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both cheeks, forehead and upper lip
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no scaling, itch, pain or lumps; feels well otherwise

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a combined contraceptive pill started ~3 months ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: full weekend of sun at the beach; recently started the pill

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: fears a rapidly spreading skin cancer

objective_data_offered.value: symmetrical medium-dark brown patches on both cheeks, the forehead and upper lip, with smooth normal skin texture and blurry edges; no lumps, scaling or sores
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot dermoscope or palpate for texture

objective_data_offered.value: feels well, no dizziness/weakness/vomiting; palms and inside of mouth look normal
